abilities.name: Arctic Burn
abilities.description: While soaring, Auroth imbues a blistering chill into each attack proportional to the affected enemy unit's current health, and applies a movement speed slow. Adds a toggle functionality to the ability that drains mana per second while active. Removes the debuff limit per affected enemy. Grants self movement speed bonus.

abilities.name: Splinter Blast
abilities.description: Launches a projectile towards a unit and shatters on impact, leaving the primary target completely unaffected, while hurling damaging splinters to enemy units within the radius and slowing them.

abilities.name: Cold Embrace
abilities.description: Encases the affected allied unit in a cocoon, healing it while preventing all physical damage instances. From winter's heart comes a cold, healing embrace. The ice slows the blood and allows the spell to better work its curative magic.

abilities.name: Winter's Curse
abilities.description: The frozen unit and those cursed to attack their ally are immune to all damage instances from their enemies, except from Auroth and her controlled units.
